hero_title: Technology, Transformation, and the People Navigating Both
hero_tagline: Writing on enterprise AI and commercial growth. From someone with the track record to close it, build the team, and ship it.
intro_bio: Twenty years inside APAC's most demanding digital programs. Estée Lauder, Shiseido, Microsoft, Merkle. Managing Director, Hong Kong. I started building AI products a few years ago, now I work on several open source projects and commercial ones. Check out my GitHub.
